basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized institution/university
qualification.details: For Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized institution/university

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): ₹37,000 per month (first two years)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Kanpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: For Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized institution/university

content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): ₹37,000 per month (first two years)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Kanpur is 02-07-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in the current recruitment drive at the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur. This offers a specific opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment is Email. Interested candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Kanpur is ₹37,000 per month for the first two years. This is a competitive stipend for research fellows.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post must have an M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized institution/university. This is the essential educational qualification for eligibility.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Kanpur JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. This means candidates can apply without any cost.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Kanpur primarily involves shortlisting of candidates. Further details regarding interviews or tests will be communicated to shortlisted applicants.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, as the recruitment is for the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur. This offers an opportunity to work in a premier institute.

faq.question: Q9. How can I get the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: You can download the official notification PDF for IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 from the "Important Links" section provided in this article. It contains all essential details.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this JRF position at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Kanpur is a Contractual job type. This means the employment will be for a specific duration as per the project requirements. It offers valuable research experience.
